overview: Several security issues were fixed in rlottie.
description:
It was discovered that rlottie did not properly handle certain inputs. An
attacker could use this issue to cause a denial of service or possibly
execute arbitrary code.

full_text:
Ubuntu Security Notices

USN-8058-1

 

 

 

 

 

 
USN-8058-1: rlottie vulnerabilities

 

 

 

 
Publication date

 

 

 
24 February 2026

 

 

 

 

 
Overview

 

 

 
Several security issues were fixed in rlottie.

 

 

 

 

 
Releases

 

 

 

 25.10

 24.04 LTS

22.04 LTS

20.04 LTS

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Open side navigation
 

 

 
Packages

 

 rlottie - library for rendering vector based animations and art
 

 

 
Details

 

 

It was discovered that rlottie did not properly handle certain inputs. An
attacker could use this issue to cause a denial of service or possibly
execute arbitrary code.

 

 

 

It was discovered that rlottie did not properly handle certain inputs. An
attacker could use this issue to cause a denial of service or possibly
execute arbitrary code.

 

 

 

 
Update instructions

 

 

 

 

In general, a standard system update will make all the necessary changes.

 Learn more about how to get the fixes.
 

 

 

 

 
The problem can be corrected by updating your system to the following package versions:

 

 

 

 

 Ubuntu Release
 Package Version
 

 25.10

questing

 librlottie0-1 – 

0.1+dfsg-4.2ubuntu0.1

 

 24.04

LTS noble

 librlottie0-1 – 

0.1+dfsg-4ubuntu1.1

 

 22.04

LTS jammy

 librlottie0-1 – 

0.1+dfsg-2ubuntu0.2

 

 20.04

LTS focal

 librlottie0-1 – 

0~git20200305.a717479+dfsg-1ubuntu0.1~esm2

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 

Reduce your security exposure

 

 Ubuntu Pro provides ten-year security coverage to 25,000+ packages in Main and Universe repositories, and it is free for up to five machines.
 

 

 Get Ubuntu Pro
